steps.title: Identify the coefficient from t = 0
steps.content:
In exponential form $n = a(b)^t$, when $t = 0$ we have $n = a(b)^0 = a$. The table shows $n(0) = 604$, so the coefficient is 604.
  • Choices A and B: no explicit coefficient means $a = 1$ → $n(0) = 1$ ✗
  • Choice D: $a = 0.004$ ✗
  • Choice C: $a = 604$ ✓

steps.title: Verify the growth factor with choice C
steps.content:
From $t = 0$ to $t = 1$, the amount increases from 604 to 606.42. The growth factor per year is:
$$\frac{606.42}{604} = 1.004 = 1 + 0.004$$
Choice C is $n = 604(1+0.004)^t$, which has exactly this base. Verify at $t = 2$:
$$604(1.004)^2 = 608.84$$
This matches the table. That matches choice C — C is correct.
